pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 17 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this property, the project may compile against the default JDK version (e.g., 11) or fail to enforce Java 17 language features and API usage required by the migration.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to reflect the target JDK for the project.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17, and the build configuration must specify this version to ensure correct compilation and runtime behavior.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version of jackson-databind to rely on the version managed by the Spring Boot parent.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages Jackson versions, and specifying an older version (2.12.3) can cause dependency conflicts or incompatibilities with Spring Boot 3's managed dependencies.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to reflect the target JDK for the project.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; the build tool needs to know the target Java version to compile and run correctly.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missed optimizations, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to reflect the target JDK for the project.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; the build tool needs to know the target source and compatibility level to compile correctly.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to target the new JDK version.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 17; keeping java.version at 1.8 would cause compilation failures or incorrect bytecode generation for the target runtime.
